description:
Install, update and play indie games

The itch.io app, itch, lets you effortlessly download and run games and software from itch.io. All of your downloads are kept in a single place and are automatically updated. Access your collections and purchases, or browse for new games via the in-app browser.
A follow-up to 26.12.0 with Upload page fixes and an Electron bump.
Upload
- The source picker in the push dialog now has separate "Select folder" and "Select .zip" buttons, since a single file dialog can't pick both a folder and a file. This prevented the OS specific issues of not being able to select a folder or a zip to upload.
- Fixed drag and drop of a source folder or .zip onto the push dialog. A changed Electron API was responsible for preventing drag an drop working as expected
- The build list toolbar now reflows for narrow window widths if you need to shrink the app width down a lot.
Electron
- Upgraded Electron from 41 to 42.1.0
Translations
- Synced translations
